/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc -O3 -march=native -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/k-mer-mt.dir/src/main_multithread.c.o" -o k-mer-mt   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -lomp
